SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED IN FRONT OF JUDGE DESMOND IN D#503 ON FRIDAY AUGUST 4, 2000 AT 1:30 P.M, IF NOT RESOLVED, MATTER WILL BE UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG 4, 2000.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHANG, YONOK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 174 ELLIS ST. #415 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $555.56 RENT, $7,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $871.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,926.56, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER REASONABLE COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES ACCORDING TO PROOF.
